title: [Castle Darkstone]
description: You are standing before the main gate of a decrepit ruin of stone, which appears to have once been a great fortress.  A moat filled with brackish water and foul smells surrounds the ruin, providing safeguard against intruders.

wayto.6998: ;e bridgedown = false; until bridgedown; if ['Halfling','Dwarf','Burghal Gnome','Forest Gnome'].include?(Stats.race); fput 'jump'; else; fput 'pull rope'; end; bridgedown = matchtimeout(0.25, /give it a good yank!|since it is underneath|what were you referring to?|that was fun./i); unless standing?; fput 'stand'; waitrt?; end; waitrt?; end; move 'go drawbridge'; $go2_restart = true if Room.current.id != 6998
